/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libNest.so -o libNest.so CMakeFiles/Nest.dir/Nest_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Nest.dir/Nest.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/lib/argos3  -L/home/tristan/src/argos3/build_simulator/argos3-examples/Collision_Free_CPFA/build  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/argos3:/home/tristan/src/argos3/build_simulator/argos3-examples/Collision_Free_CPFA/build -Wl,-Bstatic -ldl -lpthread -Wl,-Bdynamic -lfreeimage -lfreeimageplus -lGL -lGLU -lglut -lXi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 -llua5.3 -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
